prompt: This sounds too stiff and quantized. Add some rhythmic looseness — some notes slightly early or late.

args.content:
ch 1 Melody
  plugin mini

sec verse
  ch 1 Melody
    p q q q q
    n 60 62 64 65
    t -10 5 10 -5

ch 1 Melody
